query:
SELECT e.id, e.name, e.isOpen, e.manuallyClosed, bh.dayOfWeek, bh.isActive, bh.openTime, bh.closeTime 
FROM establishments e 
LEFT JOIN businessHours bh ON e.id = bh.establishmentId 
WHERE e.name LIKE '%Kelri%' 
ORDER BY bh.dayOfWeek;
command:
